channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Skiers with roots in Lake Tahoe’s alpine community among 8 killed in California avalanche
item.description: Authorities say the bodies of eight backcountry skiers have been found and one remains missing after an avalanche near Lake Tahoe in California.

item.title: The backcountry ski trip hit by avalanche was led by an outfit offering mountain adventures globally
Snow drought helped set the stage for deadly California avalanche, leading to unstable conditions
